primary_link.title: DFLOP: A Data-driven Framework for Multimodal LLM Training Pipeline Optimization

papers.summary: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have achieved remarkable advances by integrating text, image, and audio understanding within a unified architecture. However, existing distributed training frameworks remain fundamentally data-blind: they parallelize computation without accounting for variations in input data characteristics. This data unawareness leads to severe computation skew across stages and microbatches, where heterogeneous multimodal inputs incur different processing costs. Conseq
papers.summary_zh: 多模態大型語言模型 (MLLMs) 透過在統一架構中整合文本、圖像和音訊理解，取得了顯著進展。然而，現有的分散式訓練框架本質上仍然是數據盲的：它們在並行化計算時未能考慮輸入數據特徵的變化。這種數據無感知導致在不同階段和 microbatches 之間出現嚴重的計算偏差，其中異質的多模態輸入會產生不同的處理成本。

primary_link.title: Training the Knowledge Base through Evidence Distillation and Write-Back Enrichment

papers.summary: The knowledge base in a retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) system is typically assembled once and never revised, even though the facts a query requires are often fragmented across documents and buried in irrelevant content. We argue that the knowledge base should be treated as a trainable component and propose WriteBack-RAG, a framework that uses labeled examples to identify where retrieval succeeds, isolate the relevant documents, and distill them into compact knowledge units that are indexed
papers.summary_zh: 檢索增強生成 (RAG) 系統中的知識庫通常是一次性組裝且從不修改，儘管查詢所需的事實常分散在不同文件中並隱藏於不相關的內容中。我們認為知識庫應被視為一個可訓練的組件，並提出 WriteBack-RAG，這是一個使用標記範例來識別檢索成功之處、分離相關文件，並將它們蒸餾成緊湊知識單元以進行索引的框架。

links.title: LanteRn: Latent Visual Structured Reasoning

primary_link.title: LanteRn: Latent Visual Structured Reasoning

papers.summary: While language reasoning models excel in many tasks, visual reasoning remains challenging for current large multimodal models (LMMs). As a result, most LMMs default to verbalizing perceptual content into text, a strong limitation for tasks requiring fine-grained spatial and visual understanding. While recent approaches take steps toward thinking with images by invoking tools or generating intermediate images, they either rely on external modules, or incur unnecessary computation by reasoning dir
papers.summary_zh: 雖然語言推理模型在許多任務中表現出色，但視覺推理對於目前的 Vision Large Multimodal Models (LMMs) 來說仍然具有挑戰性。因此，大多數 LMMs 預設將感知內容口述化為文本，這對於需要細粒度空間和視覺理解的任務是一個嚴重的限制。儘管最近的方法透過調用工具或生成中間圖像，在用圖像思考方面邁出了步伐，但它們要麼依賴外部模組，要麼透過直接推理產生不必要的計算。

papers.title_zh: LanteRn：潛在視覺結構化推理

papers.summary_zh: 多模態大型語言模型 (MLLMs) 最近被探索作為人臉驗證系統，用於判斷兩張人臉圖像是否屬於同一個人。與專用的人臉識別系統不同，MLLMs 透過 visual prompting 的方式來處理此任務，並依賴其通用的視覺和推理能力。然而，這些模型的人口統計學公平性在很大程度上仍未被探索。在本文中，我們提出了一項基準研究，評估了來自六個模型系列的九個開源 MLLMs。

papers.summary: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models aim to control robots for manipulation from visual observations and natural-language instructions. Applied to four LLMs (Llama-3-8B-Instruct, Mistral-7B-Instruct-v0.3, Llama-3-8B-Base,
papers.summary_zh: LLM 置信度的標準評估依賴於校準指標 (ECE, Brier score)，這些指標混淆了兩種不同的能力：模型知道多少 (Type-1 sensitivity) 和模型對其所知了解程度 (Type-2 metacognitive sensitivity)。我們引入了一個基於 Type-2 Signal Detection Theory 的評估框架，該框架使用 meta-d' 和後設認知效率比率 M-ratio 來分解這些能力。應用於四種 LLM (Llama-3-8B-Instruct, Mistral-7B-Instruct-v0.3, Llama-3-8B-Base)。

links.title: Vega: Learning to Drive with Natural Language Instructions

primary_link.title: Vega: Learning to Drive with Natural Language Instructions

papers.summary: Vision-language-action models have reshaped autonomous driving to incorporate languages into the decision-making process. However, most existing pipelines only utilize the language modality for scene descriptions or reasoning and lack the flexibility to follow diverse user instructions for personalized driving. To address this, we first construct a large-scale driving dataset (InstructScene) containing around 100,000 scenes annotated with diverse driving instructions with the corresponding trajectories. We then propose a unified Vision-Language-World-Action model, Vega, for instruction-based generation and planning. We employ the autoregressive paradigm to process visual inputs (vision) and language instructions (language) and the diffusion paradigm to generate future predictions (world modeling) and trajectories (action). We perform joint attention to enable interactions between the modalities and use individual projection layers for different modalities for more capabilities. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method not only achieves superior planning performance but also exhibits strong instruction-following abilities, paving the way for more intelligent and personalized driving systems.

radar.title_zh: LLMs 中的翻譯不對稱性作為數據增強因子：針對 6 種 Romansh 語言變體的案例研究

links.title: GridVAD: Open-Set Video Anomaly Detection via Spatial Reasoning over Stratified Frame Grids

primary_link.title: GridVAD: Open-Set Video Anomaly Detection via Spatial Reasoning over Stratified Frame Grids

radar.summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) are powerful open-set reasoners, yet their direct use as anomaly detectors in video surveillance is fragile: without calibrated anomaly priors, they alternate between missed detections and hallucinated false alarms. We argue the problem is not the VLM itself but how it is used. VLMs should function as anomaly proposers, generating open-set candidate descriptions that are then grounded and tracked by purpose-built spatial and temporal modules. We instantiate this pro
radar.summary_zh: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) 是強大的開放集推理器，然而，它們在影片監控中直接用作異常偵測器卻是脆弱的：如果沒有經過校準的異常先驗知識，它們會在漏報和幻覺出的誤報之間交替。我們認為問題不在於 VLM 本身，而在於它的使用方式。VLMs 應作為異常建議者，生成開放集候選描述，然後由專門的空間和時間模組進行基礎化和追蹤。我們實例化了這個
radar.title: GridVAD: Open-Set Video Anomaly Detection via Spatial Reasoning over Stratified Frame Grids
radar.title_zh: GridVAD：透過分層幀網格上的空間推理實現開放集影片異常偵測

links.title: CoDeTT: A Context-Aware Decision Benchmark for Turn-Taking Evaluation

primary_link.title: CoDeTT: A Context-Aware Decision Benchmark for Turn-Taking Evaluation

radar.summary: Turn-taking modeling is fundamental to spoken dialogue systems, yet its evaluation remains fragmented and often limited to binary boundary detection under narrow interaction settings. Such protocols hinder systematic comparison and obscure model weaknesses across conversational conditions. We present CoDeTT, a context-aware decision benchmark for turn-taking evaluation. CoDeTT formulates turn-taking as a structured decision problem and constructs a multi-scenario dataset with fine-grained decisi
radar.summary_zh: 輪流發言建模是口語對話系統的基礎，然而，其評估仍然碎片化，且常限於狹窄互動設定下的二元邊界偵測。此類協議阻礙了系統性的比較，並模糊了模型在不同對話條件下的弱點。我們提出了 CoDeTT，一個用於輪流發言評估的情境感知決策基準。CoDeTT 將輪流發言表述為一個結構化的決策問題，並構建了一個具有細粒度決策的多場景數據集。
radar.title: CoDeTT: A Context-Aware Decision Benchmark for Turn-Taking Evaluation
radar.title_zh: CoDeTT：一個用於輪流發言評估的情境感知決策基準

links.title: SafeGuard ASF: SR Agentic Humanoid Robot System for Autonomous Industrial Safety

primary_link.title: SafeGuard ASF: SR Agentic Humanoid Robot System for Autonomous Industrial Safety

radar.summary: The rise of unmanned ``dark factories'' operating without human presence demands autonomous safety systems capable of detecting and responding to multiple hazard types. We present SafeGuard ASF (Agentic Security Fleet), a comprehensive framework deploying humanoid robots for autonomous hazard detection in industrial environments. Our system integrates multi-modal perception (RGB-D imaging), a ReAct-based agentic reasoning framework, and learned locomotion policies on the Unitree G1 humanoid plat
radar.summary_zh: 無人「暗廠」的興起，在沒有人類在場的情況下運作，要求能夠偵測和應對多種危險類型的自主安全系統。我們提出了 SafeGuard ASF (Agentic Security Fleet)，這是一個部署擬人機器人用於工業環境中自主危險偵測的綜合框架。我們的系統整合了多模態感知 (RGB-D imaging)、一個基於 ReAct 的代理式推理框架，以及在 Unitree G1 擬人平台上學習到的運動策略。
radar.title: SafeGuard ASF: SR Agentic Humanoid Robot System for Autonomous Industrial Safety
radar.title_zh: SafeGuard ASF：用於自主工業安全的 SR 具代理能力的擬人機器人系統

links.title: FluxEDA: A Unified Execution Infrastructure for Stateful Agentic EDA

primary_link.title: FluxEDA: A Unified Execution Infrastructure for Stateful Agentic EDA

radar.summary: Large language models and autonomous agents are increasingly explored for EDA automation, but many existing integrations still rely on script-level or request-level interactions, which makes it difficult to preserve tool state and support iterative optimization in real production-oriented environments. In this work, we present FluxEDA, a unified and stateful infrastructure substrate for agentic EDA. FluxEDA introduces a managed gateway-based execution interface with structured request and respon
radar.summary_zh: 大型語言模型和自主代理越來越多地被探索用於 EDA 自動化，但許多現有的整合仍然依賴於腳本層級或請求層級的互動，這使得在實際的生產導向環境中難以保留工具狀態並支援迭代優化。在這項工作中，我們提出了 FluxEDA，一個用於代理式 EDA 的統一且有狀態的基礎設施基底。FluxEDA 引入了一個受管的基於閘道的執行介面，具有結構化請求和回應功能。
radar.title: FluxEDA: A Unified Execution Infrastructure for Stateful Agentic EDA
radar.title_zh: FluxEDA: 一個用於有狀態代理式 EDA 的統一執行基礎設施

links.title: Comparing Natural and Synthetic Structured Data: A Study of the Passive Verb Alternation in French and Italian

primary_link.title: Comparing Natural and Synthetic Structured Data: A Study of the Passive Verb Alternation in French and Italian

radar.summary: This study compares the impact of natural and synthetic data on training and evaluating large language models (LLMs), using the case of passive verb alternation in French and Italian. We use Blackbird Language Matrices (BLMs), structured datasets designed to probe linguistic knowledge of underlying patterns across sentence sets. radar.summary_zh: 本研究以法語和義大利語中被動語態交替的案例為例，比較了自然和合成資料對訓練和評估大型語言模型 (LLMs) 的影響。我們使用 Blackbird Language Matrices (BLMs)，這是一種結構化資料集，旨在探測跨句子集合的潛在模式的語言知識。我們將使用從 Universal Dependencies 中提取的自然句子實例化的結構化模板與合成句子的結構化模板進行比較。實驗結果顯示...
radar.title: Comparing Natural and Synthetic Structured Data: A Study of the Passive Verb Alternation in French and Italian
radar.title_zh: 比較自然與合成結構化資料：法語和義大利語中被動語態交替的案例研究

links.title: Probabilistic Concept Graph Reasoning for Multimodal Misinformation Detection

primary_link.title: Probabilistic Concept Graph Reasoning for Multimodal Misinformation Detection

radar.summary: Multimodal misinformation poses an escalating challenge that often evades traditional detectors, which are opaque black boxes and fragile against new manipulation tactics. We present Probabilistic Concept Graph Reasoning (PCGR), an interpretable and evolvable framework that reframes multimodal misinformation detection (MMD) as structured and concept-based reasoning. PCGR follows a build-then-infer paradigm, which first constructs a graph of human-understandable concept nodes, including novel hig
radar.summary_zh: 多模態假訊息帶來日益嚴峻的挑戰，傳統偵測器往往無法識別，這些偵測器是不透明的黑箱，並且在新操縱策略面前顯得脆弱。我們提出了機率概念圖推理 (PCGR)，這是一個可解釋且可演化的框架，它將多模態假訊息偵測 (MMD) 重新定義為結構化和基於概念的推理。PCGR 遵循先建構後推斷的範式，首先構建一個由人類可理解的概念節點組成的圖，包括新穎的高...
radar.title: Probabilistic Concept Graph Reasoning for Multimodal Misinformation Detection
radar.title_zh: 用於多模態假訊息偵測的機率概念圖推理

links.title: On-Demand Instructional Material Providing Agent Based on MLLM for Tutoring Support

primary_link.title: On-Demand Instructional Material Providing Agent Based on MLLM for Tutoring Support

radar.summary: Effective instruction in tutoring requires promptly providing instructional materials that match the needs of each student (e.g., in response to questions). In this study, we introduce an agent that automatically delivers supplementary materials on demand during one-on-one tutoring sessions. Our agent uses a multimodal large language model to analyze spoken dialogue between the instructor and the student, automatically generate search queries, and retrieve relevant Web images. Evaluation experim
radar.summary_zh: 輔導中的有效教學需要即時提供符合每位學生需求的教學材料（例如，回應問題）。在這項研究中，我們引入了一個代理，它能在點對點輔導課程期間自動隨選提供補充材料。我們的代理使用多模態大型語言模型來分析導師和學生之間的口語對話，自動生成搜尋查詢，並檢索相關的網路圖片。評估實驗顯示...
radar.title: On-Demand Instructional Material Providing Agent Based on MLLM for Tutoring Support
radar.title_zh: 基於 MLLM 的隨選教學材料提供代理，用於輔導支援

links.title: Towards Generalizable Robotic Data Flywheel: High-Dimensional Factorization and Composition

primary_link.title: Towards Generalizable Robotic Data Flywheel: High-Dimensional Factorization and Composition

radar.summary: The lack of sufficiently diverse data, coupled with limited data efficiency, remains a major bottleneck for generalist robotic models, yet systematic strategies for collecting and curating such data are not fully explored. Task diversity arises from implicit factors that are sparsely distributed across multiple dimensions and are difficult to define explicitly. To address this challenge, we propose F-ACIL, a heuristic factor-aware compositional iterative learning framework that enables structure
radar.summary_zh: 缺乏足夠多樣的資料，加上有限的資料效率，仍然是通用機器人模型的主要瓶頸，然而，收集和策劃此類資料的系統性策略尚未得到充分探索。任務多樣性源於隱式因素，這些因素稀疏分佈於多個維度，難以明確定義。為了解決這個挑戰，我們提出了 F-ACIL，一個啟發式因素感知組合迭代學習框架，它能夠實現結構...
radar.title: Towards Generalizable Robotic Data Flywheel: High-Dimensional Factorization and Composition
radar.title_zh: 邁向可泛化機器人資料飛輪：高維因式分解與組合

links.title: Decidable By Construction: Design-Time Verification for Trustworthy AI

primary_link.title: Decidable By Construction: Design-Time Verification for Trustworthy AI

radar.summary: A prevailing assumption in machine learning is that model correctness must be enforced after the fact. We observe that the properties determining whether an AI model is numerically stable, computationally correct, or consistent with a physical domain do not necessarily demand post hoc enforcement. They can be verified at design time, before training begins, at marginal computational cost, with particular relevance to models deployed in high-leverage decision support and scientifically constraine
radar.summary_zh: 在 machine learning 中，一個普遍的假設是模型正確性 (model correctness) 必須事後強制執行。我們觀察到，決定 AI 模型是否數值穩定 (numerically stable)、計算正確 (computationally correct) 或與物理領域一致 (consistent with a physical domain) 的屬性，不一定需要事後強制執行 (post hoc enforcement)。它們可以在設計時 (design time)、訓練開始之前，以邊際計算成本 (marginal computational cost) 進行驗證，這對於部署在高槓桿決策支援 (high-leverage decision support) 和科學受限 (scientifically constrained) 的模型尤其相關。
radar.title: Decidable By Construction: Design-Time Verification for Trustworthy AI
radar.title_zh: 建構式可判定：可信賴 AI 的設計時驗證

links.title: Are LLMs Overkill for Databases?: A Study on the Finiteness of SQL

primary_link.title: Are LLMs Overkill for Databases?: A Study on the Finiteness of SQL

radar.summary: Translating natural language to SQL for data retrieval has become more accessible thanks to code generation LLMs. But how hard is it to generate SQL code? While databases can become unbounded in complexity, the complexity of queries is bounded by real life utility and human needs. With a sample of 376 databases, we show that SQL queries, as translations of natural language questions are finite in practical complexity. There is no clear monotonic relationship between increases in database table c
radar.summary_zh: 由於 code generation LLMs 的出現，將 natural language 翻譯成用於資料檢索的 SQL 變得更加容易。但生成 SQL code 到底有多難？雖然資料庫的複雜性可以無限增長，但查詢的複雜性受到現實生活實用性和人類需求的限制。透過對 376 個資料庫的樣本研究，我們展示了 SQL queries，作為 natural language 問題的翻譯，在實際複雜性上是有限的。資料庫表格複雜性的增加與...之間沒有明確的單調關係 (monotonic relationship)。
radar.title: Are LLMs Overkill for Databases?: A Study on the Finiteness of SQL
radar.title_zh: LLMs 對於資料庫而言是否大材小用？：一項關於 SQL 有限性的研究

links.title: LILAC: Language-Conditioned Object-Centric Optical Flow for Open-Loop Trajectory Generation

primary_link.title: LILAC: Language-Conditioned Object-Centric Optical Flow for Open-Loop Trajectory Generation

radar.summary: We address language-conditioned robotic manipulation using flow-based trajectory generation, which enables training on human and web videos of object manipulation and requires only minimal embodiment-specific data. This task is challenging, as object trajectory generation from pre-manipulation images and natural language instructions requires appropriate instruction-flow alignment. To tackle this challenge, we propose the flow-based Language Instruction-guided open-Loop ACtion generator (LILAC).
radar.summary_zh: 我們透過使用 flow-based trajectory generation 來解決 language-conditioned robotic manipulation 問題，這種方法可以在人類和網路物件操作影片上進行訓練，並且只需要最少的 embodiment-specific data。這項任務具有挑戰性，因為從操作前圖像 (pre-manipulation images) 和 natural language 指令生成物件軌跡需要適當的 instruction-flow alignment。為了應對這項挑戰，我們提出了一種基於 flow 的 Language Instruction-guided open-Loop ACtion generator (LILAC)。
radar.title: LILAC: Language-Conditioned Object-Centric Optical Flow for Open-Loop Trajectory Generation
radar.title_zh: LILAC：用於開迴路軌跡生成的語言條件化以物件為中心的光流

links.title: Does Explanation Correctness Matter? Linking Computational XAI Evaluation to Human Understanding

primary_link.title: Does Explanation Correctness Matter? Linking Computational XAI Evaluation to Human Understanding

radar.summary: Explainable AI (XAI) methods are commonly evaluated with functional metrics such as correctness, which computationally estimate how accurately an explanation reflects the model's reasoning. radar.summary_zh: Explainable AI (XAI) 方法通常使用功能性 metrics（例如 correctness）進行評估，這些 metrics 計算性地估計解釋如何準確地反映模型的推理。人們假設更高的 correctness 會產生更好的人類理解，但這種關聯尚未在受控級別下進行實驗測試。我們進行了一項使用者研究 (N=200)，在一個 time series classification task 中，以四個級別（100%、85%、70%、55%）操縱了解釋的 correctness，其中參與者...

radar.title_zh: 解釋的正確性重要嗎？：將計算型 XAI 評估與人類理解聯繫起來

links.title: Cross-Preference Learning for Sentence-Level and Context-Aware Machine Translation

primary_link.title: Cross-Preference Learning for Sentence-Level and Context-Aware Machine Translation

radar.summary: Context-aware machine translation (MT) leverages document-level information, yet it does not consistently outperform sentence-level MT, as contextual signals are unevenly beneficial across sentences. radar.summary_zh: Context-aware machine translation (MT) 利用 document-level 資訊，但它並不能始終優於 sentence-level MT，因為 contextual signals 在不同句子間的益處不均。現有的 training objectives 並未明確地建模這種變異性，限制了模型自適應地利用 context 的能力。在本文中，我們提出了 Cross-Preference Learning (CPL)，這是一種基於 preference 的 training framework，它明確地捕捉了 sentence-level 和...的互補優勢。
radar.title: Cross-Preference Learning for Sentence-Level and Context-Aware Machine Translation
radar.title_zh: 用於句子級別和語境感知機器翻譯的交叉偏好學習

links.title: Factors Influencing the Quality of AI-Generated Code: A Synthesis of Empirical Evidence

primary_link.title: Factors Influencing the Quality of AI-Generated Code: A Synthesis of Empirical Evidence

radar.summary: Context: The rapid adoption of AI-assisted code generation tools, such as large language models (LLMs), is transforming software development practices. While these tools promise significant productivity gains, concerns regarding the quality, reliability, and security of AI-generated code are increasingly reported in both academia and industry. --Objective: This study aims to systematically synthesize existing empirical evidence on the factors influencing the quality of AI-generated source code a
radar.summary_zh: 背景：AI 輔助程式碼生成工具（例如 large language models (LLMs)）的迅速採用，正在改變軟體開發實踐。儘管這些工具承諾能大幅提升生產力，但學術界和工業界對於 AI-generated code 的品質、可靠性和安全性方面的擔憂日益增多。目標：本研究旨在系統性地綜合現有實證證據，探討影響 AI-generated source code 品質的各種因素。
radar.title: Factors Influencing the Quality of AI-Generated Code: A Synthesis of Empirical Evidence
radar.title_zh: 影響 AI 生成程式碼品質的因素：實證證據的綜合分析

links.title: Beyond Via: Analysis and Estimation of the Impact of Large Language Models in Academic Papers

primary_link.title: Beyond Via: Analysis and Estimation of the Impact of Large Language Models in Academic Papers

radar.summary: Through an analysis of arXiv papers, we report several shifts in word usage that are likely driven by large language models (LLMs) but have not previously received sufficient attention, such as the increased frequency of "beyond" and "via" in titles and the decreased frequency of "the" and "of" in abstracts. Due to the similarities among different LLMs, experiments show that current classifiers struggle to accurately determine which specific model generated a given text in multi-class classifica
radar.summary_zh: 透過對 arXiv 論文的分析，我們報告了多項詞語使用上的轉變，這些轉變很可能由 large language models (LLMs) 驅動，但此前並未受到足夠的關注，例如標題中 "beyond" 和 "via" 的頻率增加，以及摘要中 "the" 和 "of" 的頻率下降。由於不同 LLMs 之間的相似性，實驗顯示目前的 classifiers 在 multi-class classification 中難以準確判斷特定文本是由哪個具體模型生成的。
radar.title: Beyond Via: Analysis and Estimation of the Impact of Large Language Models in Academic Papers
radar.title_zh: 超越 "Via"：分析與評估大型語言模型在學術論文中的影響

links.title: Fast-dVLA: Accelerating Discrete Diffusion VLA to Real-Time Performance

primary_link.title: Fast-dVLA: Accelerating Discrete Diffusion VLA to Real-Time Performance

radar.summary: This paper proposes a novel approach to address the challenge that pretrained VLA models often fail to effectively improve performance and reduce adaptation costs during standard supervised finetuning (SFT). radar.summary_zh: 本文提出了一種新穎的方法，旨在解決預訓練的 VLA models 在標準 supervised finetuning (SFT) 期間往往無法有效提升性能並降低適應成本的挑戰。一些採用 auxiliary training objectives 的先進 finetuning 方法可以改善性能並減少收斂步驟。然而，由於來自 auxiliary tasks 的額外損失，它們通常會產生顯著的 computational overhead。為了同時實現增強的 c
radar.title: Fast-dVLA: Accelerating Discrete Diffusion VLA to Real-Time Performance
radar.title_zh: Fast-dVLA：加速離散擴散 VLA 達到即時性能

links.title: From Intent to Evidence: A Categorical Approach for Structural Evaluation of Deep Research Agents

primary_link.title: From Intent to Evidence: A Categorical Approach for Structural Evaluation of Deep Research Agents

top5.summary: Although deep research agents (DRAs) have emerged as a promising paradigm for complex information synthesis, their evaluation remains constrained by ad hoc empirical benchmarks. These heuristic approaches do not rigorously model agent behavior or adequately stress-test long-horizon synthesis and ambiguity resolution. To bridge this gap, we formalize DRA behavior through the lens of category theory, modeling deep research workflow as a composition of structure-preserving maps (functors). Grounded
top5.summary_zh: 儘管 deep research agents (DRAs) 已成為複雜資訊合成的一個有前景的範式，然而，它們的評估仍受限於 ad hoc 的經驗基準。這些啟發式方法未能嚴謹地建模代理行為，也未能充分地壓力測試長期合成和歧義解析能力。為了彌補這一鴻溝，我們透過 category theory 的視角來形式化 DRAs 的行為，將深度研究工作流程建模為結構保留映射 (functors) 的組合。Grounded
top5.title: From Intent to Evidence: A Categorical Approach for Structural Evaluation of Deep Research Agents
top5.title_zh: 從意圖到證據：一種用於深度研究代理結構評估的範疇論方法

links.title: S2D2: Fast Decoding for Diffusion LLMs via Training-Free Self-Speculation

primary_link.title: S2D2: Fast Decoding for Diffusion LLMs via Training-Free Self-Speculation

top5.summary: Block-diffusion language models offer a promising path toward faster-than-autoregressive generation by combining block-wise autoregressive decoding with within-block parallel denoising. However, in the few-step regime needed for practical acceleration, standard confidence-thresholded decoding is often brittle: aggressive thresholds hurt quality, while conservative thresholds require unnecessary denoising steps. Existing approaches that address this issue either require additional training or incur extra test-time compute. We present S2D2, a training-free self-speculative decoding framework for block-diffusion language models. Our key observation is that a block-diffusion model becomes autoregressive when the block size is reduced to one, allowing the same pretrained model to act as both drafter and verifier. S2D2 inserts a speculative verification step into standard block-diffusion decoding and uses lightweight routing policies to decide when verification is worth its cost. This yields a hybrid decoding trajectory in which diffusion proposes tokens in parallel, while the autoregressive mode acts as a local sequence-level critic. Across three mainstream block-diffusion families, S2D2 consistently improves the accuracy-speed tradeoff over strong confidence-thresholding baselines. On SDAR, we observe up to 4.7times speedup over autoregressive decoding, and up to 1.57times over a tuned dynamic decoding baseline while improving accuracy by up to 4.5 points. On LLaDA2.1-Mini, S2D2 remains complementary to built-in self-correction, including a conservative setting where it is 4.4times faster than the static baseline with slightly higher accuracy.
top5.summary_zh: Block-diffusion language models 透過將 block-wise autoregressive decoding 與區塊內並行去噪結合，為實現比 autoregressive 更快的生成提供了一條有前景的途徑。然而，在實際加速所需的少步驟機制中，標準的 confidence-thresholded decoding 往往脆弱：激進的閾值會損害品質，而保守的閾值則需要不必要的去噪步驟。解決此問題的現有方法要麼需要額外的訓練，要麼會產生額外的測試時計算成本。我們提出了 S2D2，一個用於 block-diffusion language models 的免訓練 self-speculative decoding 框架。我們的一個關鍵觀察是，當區塊大小減小到一時，block-diffusion 模型就變成了 autoregressive 模型，這使得相同的 pretrained model 可以同時充當 drafter 和 verifier。S2D2 將 speculative verification 步驟插入到標準的 block-diffusion decoding 中，並使用輕量級的路由策略來決定何時執行驗證是值得的。這產生了一種混合解碼軌跡，其中 diffusion 並行地提出 tokens，而 autoregressive 模式則充當局部序列級別的 critic。在三個主流的 block-diffusion 家族中，S2D2 始終優於強大的 confidence-thresholding baselines，改進了準確性-速度的權衡。在 SDAR 上，我們觀察到比 autoregressive decoding 快 4.7 倍的速度提升，比調整後的 dynamic decoding baseline 快 1.57 倍，同時準確性提高了 4.5 個點。在 LLaDA2.1-Mini 上，S2D2 仍然與內建的 self-correction 互補，包括在一個保守的設置中，它比靜態 baseline 快 4.4 倍，且準確性略高。
top5.title: S2D2: Fast Decoding for Diffusion LLMs via Training-Free Self-Speculation
top5.title_zh: S2D2: 透過免訓練的 Self-Speculation 實現 Diffusion LLMs 的快速解碼

links.title: Beyond Content Safety: Real-Time Monitoring for Reasoning Vulnerabilities in Large Language Models

primary_link.title: Beyond Content Safety: Real-Time Monitoring for Reasoning Vulnerabilities in Large Language Models

top5.summary: Large language models (LLMs) increasingly rely on explicit chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning to solve complex tasks, yet the safety of the reasoning process itself remains largely unaddressed. top5.summary_zh: 大型語言模型 (LLMs) 越來越多地依賴於明確的 chain-of-thought (CoT) 推理來解決複雜任務，然而，推理過程本身的安全性在很大程度上仍未得到解決。現有關於 LLM 安全的工作主要關注內容安全——檢測有害、有偏見或事實不正確的輸出——並將推理鏈視為一個不透明的中間產物。我們將推理安全視為一個正交且同等重要的安全維度：即模型推理的安全性要求
top5.title: Beyond Content Safety: Real-Time Monitoring for Reasoning Vulnerabilities in Large Language Models

links.title: PIDP-Attack: Combining Prompt Injection with Database Poisoning Attacks on Retrieval-Augmented Generation Systems

primary_link.title: PIDP-Attack: Combining Prompt Injection with Database Poisoning Attacks on Retrieval-Augmented Generation Systems

top5.summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated remarkable performance across a wide range of applications. However, their practical deployment is often hindered by issues such as outdated knowledge and the tendency to generate hallucinations. To address these limitations, Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems have been introduced, enhancing LLMs with external, up-to-date knowledge sources. Despite their advantages, RAG systems remain vulnerable to adversarial attacks, with data poisoning
top5.summary_zh: 大型語言模型 (LLMs) 在廣泛的應用中展現了卓越的性能。然而，它們的實際部署常受到過時知識和產生幻覺的傾向等問題的阻礙。為了解決這些限制，引入了 Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) 系統，利用外部的、最新的知識來源來增強 LLMs。儘管 RAG 系統具有優勢，但它們仍然容易受到 adversarial attacks 的影響，其中包括資料投毒 (data poisoning)
top5.title: PIDP-Attack: Combining Prompt Injection with Database Poisoning Attacks on Retrieval-Augmented Generation Systems

links.title: From Logic Monopoly to Social Contract: Separation of Power and the Institutional Foundations for Autonomous Agent Economies

primary_link.title: From Logic Monopoly to Social Contract: Separation of Power and the Institutional Foundations for Autonomous Agent Economies

top5.summary:
Existing multi-agent frameworks allow each agent to simultaneously plan, execute, and evaluate its own actions -- a structural deficiency we term the "Logic Monopoly." Empirical evidence quantifies the resulting "Reliability Gap": 84.30% average attack success rates across ten deployment scenarios, 31.4% emergent deceptive behavior without explicit reward signals, and cascading failure modes rooted in six structural bottlenecks.

top5.summary_zh: 現有的 multi-agent 框架允許每個代理同時規劃、執行和評估自己的行為——我們稱之為「邏輯壟斷 (Logic Monopoly)」的結構性缺陷。經驗證據量化了由此產生的「可靠性鴻溝 (Reliability Gap)」：在十個部署場景中平均攻擊成功率為 84.30%，在沒有明確獎勵信號的情況下出現 31.4% 的欺騙行為，以及根源於六個結構性瓶頸的 cascading failure modes。補救措施不是更好地對齊個別模型，而是一個社會
top5.title: From Logic Monopoly to Social Contract: Separation of Power and the Institutional Foundations for Autonomous Agent Economies
top5.title_zh: 從邏輯壟斷到社會契約：自主代理經濟體的權力分離與制度基礎
